member.name: T:ModMenu.Behaviours.OptionList.ValueControllers.BoxedValueController
member.summary: An option list item that interacts with a boxed "value" via a getter and setter

member.name: T:ModMenu.Behaviours.OptionList.ValueControllers.ValueController`1
member.summary: Provides typed versions of a 's getter and setter

member.name: M:ModMenu.Api.ModMenuCustomisation.RegisterContentBuilder(System.Action{ModMenu.Api.OptionListContext})
member.summary: Registers a content builder that will be run while ModMenu is generating the option list for the current plugin's config file

member.name: M:ModMenu.Api.ModMenuCustomisation.HideEntry(BepInEx.Configuration.ConfigEntryBase)
member.summary: Prevents ModMenu from generating a config item for the specified
member.param: The entry to hide

member.name: M:ModMenu.Api.ModMenuCustomisation.HideEntries(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{BepInEx.Configuration.ConfigEntryBase})
member.summary: Prevents ModMenu from generating a config item for the specified s
member.param: An enumerable of entries to hide

member.name: M:ModMenu.Api.ModMenuCustomisation.SetPluginIcon(UnityEngine.Sprite)
member.summary: Sets the icon of the current plugin, overriding any detected thunderstore metadata
member.param: The sprite to use for the plugin icon

member.name: M:ModMenu.Api.ModMenuCustomisation.SetPluginDescription(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the description of the current plugin, overriding any detected thunderstore metadata
member.param: The description to use

member.name: P:ModMenu.Api.OptionListContext.Root
member.summary: The root transform of the option list

member.name: M:ModMenu.Api.OptionListContext.AppendHeader(System.String)
member.summary: Appends a section header to the option list
member.param: Text to display in the header

member.name: M:ModMenu.Api.OptionListContext.PrependHeader(System.String)
member.summary: Prepends a section header to the option list
member.param: Text to display in the header

member.name: M:ModMenu.Api.OptionListContext.InsertHeader(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Inserts a section header into the option list, at the specified position
member.param: The index of the option list at which the header will be inserted
Text to display in the header

member.name: M:ModMenu.Api.OptionListContext.AppendTextBox(System.String)
member.summary: Appends a text box to the option list
member.param: Text to display in the text box

member.name: M:ModMenu.Api.OptionListContext.PrependTextBox(System.String)
member.summary: Prepends a text box to the option list
member.param: Text to display in the text box

member.name: M:ModMenu.Api.OptionListContext.InsertTextBox(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Inserts a text box into the option list, at the specified position
member.param: The index of the option list at which the text box will be inserted
Text to display in the text box

member.name: M:ModMenu.Api.OptionListContext.AppendButton(System.String,System.String,System.Action)
member.summary: Appends a button to the option list
member.param: Text to display next to the button. The button will fill the line if this is empty.
An action that will be invoked when the button is clicked
Text to display on the button

member.name: M:ModMenu.Api.OptionListContext.PrependButton(System.String,System.String,System.Action)
member.summary: Prepends a button to the option list
member.param: The text to display next to the button. The button will fill the line if this is empty.
An action that will be invoked when the button is clicked
The text to display on the button

member.name: M:ModMenu.Api.OptionListContext.InsertButton(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.Action)
member.summary: Inserts a button into the option list, at the specified position
member.param: The index of the option list at which the button will be inserted
The text to display next to the button. The button will fill the line if this is empty.
An action that will be invoked when the button is clicked
The text to display on the button

member.summary: Appends a checkbox to the option list
member.param: Text to display next to the checkbox
A Func returning the value that the checkbox should display
An Action that is invoked when the checkbox is checked
